search_document:
User Request: Shipping dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Shipping Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Trend of shipping revenue over the months
Title: Top Shipping Regions
Type: table
Description: Regions with the highest shipping volumes
Title: Total Shipments
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of shipments made
Title: Average Shipping Time
Type: kpi
Description: Average time taken for shipments to be delivered
Title: Shipping Method Breakdown
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of shipments by shipping method

sql_queries.title: Monthly Shipping Revenue
sql_queries.description: Trend of shipping revenue over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(Freight) AS TotalShippingRevenue FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Shipping Regions
sql_queries.description: Regions with the highest shipping volumes
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, COUNT(OrderID) AS ShippingVolume FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion ORDER BY ShippingVolume DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Shipments
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalShipments FROM Orders

sql_queries.title: Average Shipping Time
sql_queries.description: Average time taken for shipments to be delivered
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(julianday(ShippedDate) - julianday(OrderDate)) AS AverageShippingTime FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL

sql_queries.title: Shipping Method Breakdown
sql_queries.description: Distribution of shipments by shipping method
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName, COUNT(Orders.OrderID) AS ShipmentCount FROM Orders JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName
